text:
File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: alphanumeric string 
Ex: 207KA0200X = Allergy Physician 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: Values and websites referenced may change over time. 

The Provider Taxonomy Codes valid values can be found in the following link: 
https://x12.org/codes/provider-taxonomy-codes 

This variable is not sourced from T-MSIS data as reported by states. Rather, the value is derived by 
CMS through mapping the
